routes.name: Stealth Rush Route
routes.description: High-speed transit using stealth systems and evasive patterns. Arrive quickly but attract attention.

tradeoffs.immediate_benefit: Arrive ~30% sooner with stolen/scavenged resources, securing prime positions and political leverage
tradeoffs.delayed_cost: Higher detection risk; more system wear reduces stealth margin; crew fatigue increases vulnerability

routes.name: Shadow Route
routes.description: Low-signature transit through debris fields and radiation zones. Slower but harder to detect.

tradeoffs.immediate_benefit: Excellent stealth positioning; minimal detection risk; potential for intercepted intel during transit
tradeoffs.delayed_cost: Time delay allows Moon faction to consolidate position; increased system stress from constant jamming

routes.name: Opportunistic Loop Route
routes.description: Extended route with multiple raid points and salvage stops. Maximizes resource acquisition.

tradeoffs.immediate_benefit: Maximum stolen/scavenged resources; strong starting position with black-market assets
tradeoffs.delayed_cost: Significant time delay; increased exposure to interception; reduced political legitimacy

routes.name: Pirate Ambush Course
routes.description: Aggressive route designed for intercepting weak targets and setting up ambushes.

tradeoffs.immediate_benefit: Direct acquisition of resources through raids; demonstration of capability to both factions
tradeoffs.delayed_cost: High detection risk makes landing more dangerous; political isolation increases

chaos_mission_types.name: Black Market Access Route
chaos_mission_types.description: Focus on establishing connections and acquiring illicit assets.

chaos_mission_types.name: Data Theft Operation
chaos_mission_types.description: Focus on stealing critical intelligence and technical data.

chaos_mission_types.name: Resource Harvesting Campaign
chaos_mission_types.description: Focus on stealing fuel, water, and critical supplies.

chaos_mission_types.name: Wild Card Gambit
chaos_mission_types.description: High-risk, high-reward approach with maximum opportunism.
